4Proはcompute variantごとにOrin NX、AGX Orin、SWNUCが分かれる。
IP等級・動作温度は部品値のみで機体全体の値ではない。
humanReviewRequired: 公開Robotレコードで4Proの代表variantを決定する。

日本向け販売窓口、価格、保守条件を公式窓口で確認する。

conflicts: KUAVO 5 product page combines KUAVO 5 and KUAVO 5-W; detailed numeric source is KUAVO 5 Advanced.
KUAVO 5 Advanced manual states 29 DoF excluding end effectors while official LeTools lists Kuavo5 as 41 DoF without scope.
Official LeTools lists 20kg payload wording without scope or rated/maximum class.
humanReviewRequired: Confirm whether the Robot record represents KUAVO 5 Advanced or the broader KUAVO 5 / 5-W family.
Reconcile 29 DoF excluding end effectors with official LeTools 41 DoF before publishing a single DoF value.
Confirm current price, Japan procurement channel and any KUAVO 5-specific deployment case from Leju official channels.
